ksa_text: Knowledge of data valuation and infonomics methodologies, including frameworks for quantifying data as an enterprise asset and connecting data investment to measurable financial outcomes.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

top_anchors.element_label: Knowledge of test procedures, principles, and methodologies (e.g., Capabilities and Maturity Model Integration (CMMI)).

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.422) to justify inclusion for the Director of Data Science. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: This Knowledge KSA was excluded as an edge case, yet it has a composite score of 0.422 (moderate signal). Knowledge-dimension KSAs represent conceptual awareness rather than execution; exclusion may be too aggressive.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Edge-domain Knowledge KSAs require more than moderate signal to justify inclusion; the role's scope does not regularly engage with Leadership & Strategy. Exclusion upheld.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Upheld: edge-domain exclusion maintained. Leadership & Strategy is not sufficiently central to the Director of Data Science to warrant inclusion at this signal level.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of Data Science roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Leadership & Strategy is not a standard competency expectation for Director of Data Science. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of Data Science competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.422) and edge-domain placement (Leadership & Strategy) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of Data Science. All passes support exclusion.
